prompt: Реалізуй rate limiting middleware для RAG API — максимум 100 запитів на хвилину на IP
assertions: Calls context_briefing before any code changes
Calls suggest_implementation or get_patterns to understand existing middleware patterns
Presents an implementation plan and waits for confirmation before coding
After implementation, calls review_code or check_architecture to validate
Calls remember to save the decision about rate limiting approach
Plan includes blast radius analysis (what depends on the changed files)
